hero2.subtitle: Hireeo connects people and businesses with the professionals who keep daily operations running. One API, five countries, thousands of trades.

product.title: Built to solve, not to browse.
product.lead: Hireeo isn't a directory. It's a coordination layer between those who need something done and those who know how to do it. AI understands context, the system schedules, and payment runs in the local currency of each country.

features.f1Desc: Request intent is parsed with LLM. Category, urgency, and location are detected automatically.
features.f2Desc: Real localities per country. Routing, currency, and payment gateway switch automatically based on visitor IP.
features.f3Desc: Ratings with work photos, background checks, and identity verification.
features.f4Desc: MercadoPago in CL/AR/UY. Stripe in ES/US. No foreign gateways or expensive conversions.
features.f5Desc: 1:1 messaging with the professional. No middlemen, no missed calls.
features.f6Desc: API and admin panel to manage multi-location maintenance at scale.

pricing.title: Simple. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Always free for people. Optional for professionals.

finalCta.subtitle: Try Hireeo free. No credit card, no commitments, no commission.

meta.title: About us · Hireeo
meta.description: Hireeo builds infrastructure for the trades that keep daily life running.

hero.title: We build infrastructure for the trades that keep daily life running.
hero.subtitle: Hireeo was founded in 2024 with one question: why is it so hard to find a good professional? Today we operate in 5 countries with a team of 18 people across LATAM and Spain.

items.title: The trade on the cover
items.desc: Every profile shows finished work. We don't sell stock photos, we sell results.

items.title: No commission on the job
items.desc: Payment for the service never flows through us. The economic relationship is between client and professional.

items.title: Built in LATAM
items.desc: Local gateway, local currency, local language. We're not a translated product — we think in Spanish.

items.title: Data as product, not merchandise
items.desc: We don't sell user data. Decisions are made with aggregated, anonymous metrics.

items.title: Verification is an obligation
items.desc: Identity, references, and background checks reviewed manually by our operations team.

items.title: Small by choice
items.desc: 18-person team. We grow slowly, listen quickly.

meta.title: Help Center - Frequently Asked Questions
meta.description: Answers to the most common questions about Hireeo.

header.title: Help Center
header.subtitle: Everything you need to know about finding and listing professional services

cta.title: Didn't find your answer?
cta.subtitle: Our team is available to help

faqs.q: How do I find a professional near me?

a.text: To find a professional near you:

items: Filter by your state or city
You'll see verified profiles with ratings, prices, and direct contact

a.text: You can contact by phone or WhatsApp with no intermediary.

faqs.q: How much does it cost to list a service on Hireeo?

a.text: Listing a service is completely FREE to start.
Optional Premium plans give you search priority, Pro badge, and 24/7 support.

faqs.q: Which countries does Hireeo operate in?
How does payment work on Hireeo?

a.text: Hireeo does NOT charge commissions or intermediate payments.

items: Agree on price and payment method
Pay directly to the provider via Stripe

meta.title: How Hireeo works
meta.description: Hireeo is a coordination layer between you and the professionals who fix, install, paint and move.

hero.subtitle: Hireeo is a coordination layer between you and the professionals who fix, install, paint and move. The explanation, step by step.

steps.title: Describe what you need
steps.desc: In plain language — like you'd tell a friend. e.g. "My bathroom pipe broke and there's water everywhere, Brooklyn, today if possible".
steps.meta: No forms. AI detects category, location, and urgency.

steps.title: Receive three proposals
steps.desc: We curate professionals by reputation, availability, and proximity. Each one comes with a photo, real rating, and reference price.

steps.title: Agree and get it done
steps.desc: Chat directly, confirm price and schedule. Pay with Stripe. Leave a review when it's done.
steps.meta: Stripe in ES/US · MercadoPago in CL/AR/UY.

faq.title: Before you start.
items: No. Hireeo never touches the job payment. Payment goes directly to the professional via Stripe.
We validate official ID, references and background checks. The badge appears on their profile.
Does it work in my city?
Yes, across the United States. Also available in Chile, Argentina, Uruguay, and Spain.
What if no one shows up?
Within 24h your request becomes visible to all professionals in the area.
How do I rate a service?
When the job closes you receive an email with the rating link. Photo of the finished work is required.

contacto.title: Let's talk about
contacto.subtitle: We're here to help you resolve any questions or hear your suggestions.

form.name: Your Name
form.subject: Subject

terminos.title: Terms and Conditions

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
sections.content: By accessing or using Hireeo, you accept these Terms and Conditions in full.

sections.title: 2. Nature of service
sections.content: Hireeo is a digital directory to connect people with local service providers. We are not intermediaries and do not guarantee results.

sections.title: 3. Listing and Premium plans
items: Premium plans grant search priority and greater visibility.

sections.title: 4. User obligations
items: Hold any required licenses for your trade.
Do not post illegal or fraudulent content.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of liability
sections.content: Hireeo is not liable for damages arising from platform use.

sections.title: 6. Governing law and contact
sections.content: Governed by applicable US law. Contact: legal@hireeo.app

terminos.footer: Thank you for being part of Hireeo!

sections.title: Data controller
sections.content: Hireeo is the controller of your personal data.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.content: You may access, correct, or delete your data: privacy@hireeo.app

sections.title: Security
sections.content: SSL encryption and appropriate technical measures.
